subject: Escalation: siamese blockers for Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-0225
body: Please note the siamese stream in Canberra has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Winston Churchill. Reference initiative INIT-0225. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
